overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection filled with traffic and digital billboards. The scene is rendered in a high-quality game engine with bright midday sunlight illuminating the glass towers and busy streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise commercial district with digital advertising towers

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on the building ledge, surveying the busy city street and traffic below

entered.detail: Tall glass skyscraper facade with reflective windows that Spider-Man is perched upon
Tall building covered with large glowing digital screens displaying colorful advertisements
Prominent red building with large signage visible at the end of the street canyon
Multi-lane street filled with moving vehicles and pedestrians crossing at intersections
Brightly lit digital billboards showing various colorful advertisements on the right building facade

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crouches on the ledge of a glass skyscraper, overlooking a bustling urban canyon filled with heavy traffic and pedestrians. Digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street while the distant intersection teems with cars moving through the multi-lane road below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate focus on a perched figure before expanding to reveal the vast scale of a bustling urban canyon. It begins with Spider-Man crouching on the ledge of a glass skyscraper, overlooking a dense city intersection filled with heavy traffic and pedestrians. As the camera shifts its perspective, the view opens up to showcase the multi-lane roads below where cars teem in a constant flow. The scene then expands further to highlight the vibrant digital billboards illuminating the right side of the street, finally capturing the immense depth of the sunlit metropolis.
